title: Figure 2 from: Dissanayake LS, Maharachchikumbura SSN, Marasinghe DS, Gao Y, Faraj TKH, Xu J, Wanasinghe DN (2026) Taxonomic novelties and phylogenetic insights into Cainiaceae (Xylariales, Sordariomycetes) associated with Poaceae hosts from Southwestern China. description: Figure 2 Amphibambusa hyalinospora (holotype HKAS 149994). a, b. Ascomata on the host surface; c, d. Section of ascoma; e. Peridium; f. Paraphyses; g–j. Asci; k. Apical ring bluing in Melzer's reagent; l–o. Ascospores; p. Upper view of the one-week-old colony on PDA; q. Reverse view. Scale bars: 50 μm (d); 10 μm (e, f); 50 μm (g–j); 20 μm (k–o).
